hero.title: Radiant Waves Media Morning Global News
hero.description: Monday, July 13, 2026. Good morning. Here are today's verified global headlines, FIFA World Cup semi-final updates, politics, business, technology and security news from around the world.

breaking: 🔴 England defeat Norway 2-1 after extra time to reach the FIFA World Cup semi-finals
🔴 Argentina overcome Switzerland 3-1 to book a semi-final clash with England
🔴 FIFA to discuss possible expansion to a 64-team World Cup in 2030
🔴 Europe continues to face heatwave conditions across several countries
🔴 Middle East diplomatic efforts continue amid regional security concerns
🔴 Nigeria sustains nationwide operations against terrorism, banditry and kidnapping
🔴 Global investors monitor inflation, energy prices and interest-rate expectations
🔴 Artificial intelligence investment continues accelerating worldwide

featured.title: World Cup Semi-Final Line-Up Nears Completion
featured.content: England secured a dramatic 2-1 extra-time victory over Norway to reach the FIFA World Cup semi-finals, while defending champions Argentina defeated Switzerland 3-1 after extra time. The tournament now enters its decisive stage as the world's best teams battle for a place in the final. FIFA officials are also preparing discussions on a possible 64-team World Cup for 2030 following the success of the expanded 48-team tournament.

articles.title: England Reach World Cup Semi-Finals
articles.description: England defeated Norway 2-1 after extra time to secure a place in the FIFA World Cup semi-finals. Jude Bellingham starred with two important goals during the dramatic encounter.

articles.title: Argentina Eliminate Switzerland
articles.description: Argentina defeated Switzerland 3-1 after extra time to progress to the semi-finals, setting up a highly anticipated meeting with England.

articles.title: Semi-Final Picture Takes Shape
articles.description: France, Argentina and England have secured semi-final places while football fans await confirmation of the remaining finalist as the tournament approaches its climax.

articles.title: FIFA Considers 64-Team World Cup
articles.description: FIFA officials are expected to discuss expanding the 2030 FIFA World Cup to 64 teams following the success of the expanded 48-team tournament in 2026.

articles.title: Middle East Diplomacy Continues
articles.description: Regional and international leaders continue diplomatic engagement aimed at improving security, humanitarian access and long-term stability across the Middle East.

articles.title: Heatwave Continues Across Europe
articles.description: Several European countries remain under weather alerts as high temperatures continue to increase wildfire risks and place additional pressure on health services.

articles.title: United States Continues Hosting World Cup
articles.description: Host cities across the United States continue welcoming supporters from around the world as the FIFA World Cup reaches its final stages.

articles.title: Asia Expands Technology Investment
articles.description: Governments and businesses across Asia continue increasing investment in artificial intelligence, semiconductor production and digital infrastructure.

articles.title: Nigeria Sustains Security Operations
articles.description: Security agencies continue nationwide operations against insurgents, terrorists, bandits and kidnapping gangs as authorities strengthen national security efforts.

articles.title: Economic Reform Remains Priority
articles.description: Government attention remains focused on inflation, food security, infrastructure, electricity supply and economic reforms aimed at supporting long-term growth.

articles.title: African Trade Integration Expands
articles.description: African countries continue strengthening regional trade, transport corridors and investment partnerships under the African Continental Free Trade Area.

articles.title: Markets Watch Inflation And Oil Prices
articles.description: Global financial markets continue monitoring inflation, central bank policy decisions, crude oil prices and economic growth expectations.

articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Investment Accelerates
articles.description: Governments and technology companies continue expanding investment in AI, robotics, cybersecurity and cloud computing.

articles.title: Global Leaders Focus On Security And Growth
articles.description: Governments around the world continue balancing economic development, national security and international cooperation amid evolving geopolitical challenges.

breakingHistory: England defeated Norway 2-1 after extra time to reach the FIFA World Cup semi-finals.
Argentina defeated Switzerland 3-1 after extra time to set up a semi-final against England.
FIFA will discuss a possible expansion to a 64-team World Cup in 2030.
Europe continues experiencing an intense summer heatwave.

Global markets remain focused on inflation and energy prices.

Governments continue prioritising economic growth and security.
The FIFA World Cup has entered the semi-final stage.
